user_goal_stage: The user is currently on the Juxtastat game page and is presented with the first question of the daily game. The goal is to play the daily game, which involves answering a series of questions.
action_plan: I will answer the questions in the Juxtastat daily game by clicking on one of the two geographical regions provided for each question. I will continue this process until all 5 questions of the daily quiz are completed, at which point I will mark the goal as achieved.

actions.reasoning: To progress in the daily game, I need to select one of the two options provided for the question 'Which has a higher % of people who are Muslim?'. I will select the first option.
actions.user_detail_query: Which geographical region should I select to answer the question 'Which has a higher % of people who are Muslim?': Fraser Valley Regional district, British Columbia, Canada or Niagara Regional municipality, Ontario, Canada?
actions.user_detail_answer: Fraser Valley Regional district, British Columbia, Canada

click_context.thought: The user needs to select one of two options to answer a question in a quiz. Selecting one option is a choice that depends on user input or knowledge, but since no preference is given, picking one is the only way to proceed with the game.
